category_sources: source_facts.description says ffmpeg2theora converts video files to Ogg Theora format.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is ffmpeg2theora; source_facts.homepage points to the official Xiph GitLab project.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Xiph GitLab project and best available official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://gitlab.xiph.org/xiph/ffmpeg2theora; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description specifies video conversion to Ogg Theora.
source_facts.executables lists ffmpeg2theora as a command-line executable.
